channel.title: Kishore Namburi — agentic and authentic · AI Blogs & Use Cases
channel.description: Practical AI use cases, deployment patterns, and lessons from two decades solving IT problems — by Kishore Namburi.

item.title: From Prototype to Production: Operationalizing AI Agents
item.dc:creator: Kishore Namburi
item.description: A platform-agnostic blueprint for taking AI agents from prototype to production—covering strategy, architecture, governance, AgentOps, and the engineering mindset shift.

item.title: Beyond the Bot: The 2026 Agentic Playbook
item.dc:creator: Kishore Namburi
item.description: The 'Chat with your PDF' era is over. Discover 2026 blueprint for building production-grade autonomous enterprise AI ecosystems.

item.title: From Hallucinations to Hyper-Personalization: How GraphRAG Grounds AI in Your Knowledge Graph
item.dc:creator: Kishore Namburi
item.description: Discover how GraphRAG with Neo4j, LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex eliminates hallucinations and enables multi-hop reasoning for hyper-personalized AI.

item.title: Maximizing ROI: The Strategic Shift to Intelligent LLM Routing
item.dc:creator: Kishore Namburi
item.description: Stop defaulting every query to frontier models. Discover how intelligent LLM routing dynamically balances cost and performance across a model ensemble.

item.title: Agentic AI: Revolutionizing Data Workflows
item.dc:creator: Kishore Namburi
item.description: Discover how autonomous AI agents are revolutionizing data analysis, automating complex workflows, and delivering real-time insights.

item.title: Building the Data Framework: 4 Core Pillars of AI-Ready Architecture
item.dc:creator: Kishore Namburi
item.description: AI-ready data architecture built on four pillars: Knowledge Core, semantic data mesh, HTAP convergence, and Active Governance Fabric.
